To ensure date alignment in Gantt charts, a new validation rule was implemented.<span> </span></span>You can also now reuse existing Actual Project Milestones in different Gantt charts.<span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"><span> </span></span>Additionally, the release includes enhanced UAF element numbering, which allows to use of multi-level and hierarchical numbering of UAF elements. </p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Moreover, the release introduces key enhancements to collaborative modeling on both Teamwork Cloud and the </span><strong style="text-align: left;">3D</strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">EXPERIENCE platform. Teamwork Cloud now supports partial project usages as a technology preview, enabling more flexible reuse of specific project parts, along with improved SSO support across command-line tools. On the<span> </span></span><strong style="text-align: left;">3D</strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">EXPERIENCE platform, standard profile migration has been simplified, and project opening performance with local cache has been significantly improved. Both Teamwork Cloud and the<span> </span></span><strong style="text-align: left;">3D</strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">EXPERIENCE platform will benefit from a new option to detect changes in derived properties during project merging or comparison.</span></p><p>To download the latest version of the modeling tool, see <ac:link><ri:page ri:space-key="IL2024xR2" ri:content-title="Downloading installation files" /></ac:link>. For further information, check the product documentation.</p><p><br /></p><hr /><p><strong style="letter-spacing: 0.0px;"><ac:link ac:anchor="UAF Features" /></strong></p><ul><li><ac:link ac:anchor="Gantt Chart Improvements" /></li><li><ac:link ac:anchor="UAF Element Numbering" /></li><li><ac:link ac:anchor="Other Enhancements" /></li></ul><p><strong style="letter-spacing: 0.0px;"><ac:link ac:anchor="mi"><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Modeling and Infrastructure]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link></strong></p><p><strong style="letter-spacing: 0.0px;"><ac:link ac:anchor="Collaboration" /></strong></p><ul><li><ac:link ac:anchor="Teamwork Cloud" /><ul><li><ac:link ac:anchor="Partial Project Usages (Technology Preview)" /></li><li><ac:link ac:anchor="Improvements to Single Sign-On Authentication" /></li></ul></li><li><ac:link ac:anchor="3DEXPERIENCE Platform" /><ul><li><ac:link ac:anchor="Easier Standard Profile Migration" /></li></ul></li></ul><p><br /></p><hr /><h1>UAF Features</h1><p><span style="font-size: 24.0px;letter-spacing: -0.01em;">Gantt Chart Improvements</span></p><ul><li data-uuid="34676d30-6bdc-4be4-9c7f-56bdc315e7f9"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">A new project option allows you to set the depth of displayed sub-resources in the Strategic Phasing/CV-3/StV-3/NCV-3/Cr Gantt Chart Capability Provisions panel. This lets you control how many sub-resource levels are displayed in the Capability Provision<span> </span>area.<span> </span><a href="https://docs.nomagic.com/display/UAF12P2024xR3/Setting+project+options">Learn more &gt;&gt;&gt;</a><br /><span class="confluence-embedded-file-wrapper image-center-wrapper"><ac:image ac:align="center"><ri:attachment ri:filename="sub_resource_depth.png" /></ac:image></span><br /></span></li><li data-uuid="71a42216-97bc-4f36-a3a6-ed0dd8de0091"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">A new toolbar button in the Gantt Chart allows you to toggle the visibility of sub-resources in the Capability Provisions panel.<span> </span> <a href="https://docs.nomagic.com/display/UAF12P2024xR3/Working+with+Strategic+Phasing+diagram">Learn more &gt;&gt;&gt;</a> <br /><span class="confluence-embedded-file-wrapper image-center-wrapper"><ac:image ac:align="center"><ri:attachment ri:filename="Show_hide_sub_resources_in_the_capability_provision_area.png" /></ac:image></span><br /></span></li><li data-uuid="7e9ac2a9-47ca-485c-a695-811433c08220"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">When you enable sub-resource visibility in the Strategic Phasing Gantt chart, you can now add, edit, or remove In Service / Out of Service dates for sub-resources directly in the Capability Provision area.<span> </span><a href="https://docs.nomagic.com/display/UAF12P2024xR3/Working+with+Strategic+Phasing+diagram">Learn more &gt;&gt;&gt;</a><br /><span class="confluence-embedded-file-wrapper image-center-wrapper"><ac:image ac:align="center"><ri:attachment ri:filename="add_edit_remove_in_out_service_dates.png" /></ac:image></span><br /></span></li><li data-uuid="bdbac909-fa38-4061-91a9-c0ce0d0199c4"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Now you can select an existing In<span> </span>Service<span> </span>/ Out of Service Actual Project Milestones in the following Gantt charts:</span><ul><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Strategic Phasing<br /></span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Resources Evolution<br /></span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Personnel Evolution<br /></span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Services Roadmap</span></li></ul></li></ul><h1 style="text-align: left;">UAF Element Numbering</h1><p style="text-align: left;"><span style="font-size: 14.0px;letter-spacing: 0.0px;">In this version, the UAF element numbering was enhanced. The multi-level</span><span style="font-size: 14.0px;letter-spacing: 0.0px;"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">numbering is now available for UAF elements. Now, you can apply:</span></p><ul><li style="text-align: left;" data-uuid="95a2c8a2-b0d8-4c45-9f0a-e2e36b5222c6"><span style="font-size: 14.0px;letter-spacing: 0.0px;color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">hierarchical numbering to UAF elements (such as Driver, Operational Information),</span></li><li style="text-align: left;" data-uuid="0a35c196-917b-4126-8844-b5acd0edfee4"><span style="font-size: 14.0px;letter-spacing: 0.0px;color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">hierarchical numbering with dynamic prefixes for the</span><span style="font-size: 14.0px;letter-spacing: 0.0px;color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"> </span><span style="font-size: 14.0px;letter-spacing: 0.0px;color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"> UAF requirements (such as Enterprise Goal, Enterprise Objective) based on SysML elements.</span></li></ul><p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"><span class="confluence-embedded-file-wrapper"><ac:image><ri:attachment ri:filename="hierarchical_element_numbering.png" /></ac:image></span></span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"><a href="https://docs.nomagic.com/display/UAF12P2024xR3/UAF+element+numbering">Learn more &gt;&gt;&gt;</a></span></p><h1>Other Enhancements</h1><ul><li data-uuid="6b8ac900-e033-4b70-9c9f-72ff914aa47c">A new Correctness validation rule was implemented to check<span> </span>whether<span> </span>the Capability Provision's actual start/end aligns with the Capability Provision's<span> </span>consolidated start/end dates.<span> </span><a href="https://docs.nomagic.com/display/UAF12P2024xR3/COR2362">Learn more &gt;&gt;&gt;</a></li></ul><p style="text-align: right;"><ac:link ac:anchor="top"><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Back to top]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link></p><h1><ac:structured-macro ac:name="anchor" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="86c1e37a-6f77-4e5e-aa46-ea5b738c8c41"><ac:parameter ac:name="">mi</ac:parameter></ac:structured-macro>Modeling and Infrastructure</h1><ul style="text-align: left;"><li data-uuid="574882fe-baeb-427d-a5e4-2ce35d9fdb95"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">You can now disable all automatic and manual usage analytics, prevent internal error submissions, and remove related environment properties by modifying the system properties. <a href="https://docs.nomagic.com/display/MD2024xR3/Sharing+Usage+Analytics+information">Learn more &gt;&gt;&gt;</a></span></li><li data-uuid="7657062d-270d-46bf-8549-7fa06b831fcb"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">This release introduces the ability to install custom browser extensions in JxBrowser.</span></li></ul><p style="text-align: right;"><ac:link ac:anchor="top"><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Back to top]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link></p><h1 style="text-align: left;"><span>Collaboration</span></h1><h2 style="text-align: left;"><span>Teamwork Cloud</span></h2><h3 style="text-align: left;">Partial Project Usages (Technology Preview)</h3><p style="text-align: left;">We’re excited to introduce a significant enhancement to project usages, now available as a<span> </span><strong>technology preview</strong>. Previously, you could only use an entire project (full usage), but with this release, you can define a usage scope and use only a specific part of a project. Additionally, you can seamlessly switch between full and partial usage at any time and adjust the usage scope as needed.<br /><br /></p><p style="text-align: center;"><span class="confluence-embedded-file-wrapper"><ac:image><ri:attachment ri:filename="partial_project_usages.png" /></ac:image></span></p><h6 style="text-align: center;">Selecting the scope of a partial project usage.</h6><h3 style="text-align: left;">Improvements to Single Sign-On Authentication</h3><p style="text-align: left;">For improved security, the Used Projects Auto Update Wizard now only accepts access tokens generated by your user when using single sign-on (SSO) authentication. Additionally, SSO is now supported in other command-line tools, like Report Wizard and Cameo Collaborator.</p><p style="text-align: right;"><ac:link ac:anchor="top"><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Back to top]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link></p><h2 style="text-align: left;"><strong>3D</strong><span>EXPERIENCE Platform</span></h2><h3 style="text-align: left;">Easier Standard Profile Migration</h3><p style="text-align: left;">The standard profile migration has been simplified allowing you to migrate all standard profiles in one go. Now, you can use the project migration<span> </span><span>dialog </span>to select the profiles from both the server and your modeling tool installation. During migration:</p><ul style="text-align: left;"><li data-uuid="91ffc6ca-c1a0-4873-bfc5-b465d74983de">Standard profiles stored in the<span> </span><strong>3D</strong>EXPERIENCE platform are migrated.</li><li data-uuid="c2db8492-f8d7-4a06-b3ab-6315c1f07673">Standard profiles existing in the modeling tool installation but not yet added to the the server can be selected and added to the<span> </span><strong>3D</strong>EXPERIENCE platform.</li><li data-uuid="e743a6d1-3b39-430b-996c-b2815c852730">Any dependent profiles are also migrated or added.</li></ul><h3 style="text-align: left;">Performance Improvements</h3><p style="text-align: left;">I<span>n version 2024x Refresh3, project opening performance has been significantly improved when a local cache is already present on your machine, as demonstrated in the chart below.<br /><br /></span></p><p style="text-align: center;"><span class="confluence-embedded-file-wrapper"><ac:image><ri:attachment ri:filename="project_opening_performance.png" /></ac:image></span></p><h6 style="text-align: center;">Comparison of project load times with local cache.</h6><h3 style="text-align: left;">Other Improvements</h3><ul style="text-align: left;"><li data-uuid="5f7fb816-e07d-43a5-96e4-8efa2fda36f2">The following predefined templates have been introduced for publishing Cameo Collaborator documents:<ul><li>UAF Template for Cameo Collaborator</li><li>UPDM Template for Cameo Collaborator</li><li>BPMN Template for Cameo Collaborator</li></ul></li><li data-uuid="b357ee12-9c99-4142-97a4-9e5b35d02ac8">You can now specify the project branch, revision, and iteration when logged in via the command line interface.</li></ul><h2 style="text-align: left;">General Collaboration Improvements</h2><ul style="text-align: left;"><li data-uuid="23d14d42-44c6-4163-afed-55a8a654c7bd">The new<span> </span><strong>Detect Changes in Derived Properties<span> </span></strong>environment option allows you to specify which derived properties to compare when detecting changes during project merge or compare.</li></ul><p><br /></p><hr /><p><ac:link><ri:page ri:space-key="NMDOC" ri:content-title="2024x Refresh2 Version News" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Version news of servers and plugins >>]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link></p></ac:layout-cell></ac:layout-section><ac:layout-section ac:type="single"><ac:layout-cell><p><br /></p></ac:layout-cell></ac:layout-section><ac:layout-section ac:type="single"><ac:layout-cell><p><br /></p></ac:layout-cell></ac:layout-section></ac:layout>
````

<!--NOMAGIC_PAGE id=272746810 space=VN version=1 -->
## PAGE 00179: (2024x Refresh3) Systems Cybersecurity Designer

- page_id: `272746810`
- space_key: `VN`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/VN/pages/272746810/2024x+Refresh3+Systems+Cybersecurity+Designer
- version_number: 1
- version_date: `2025-11-27T17:27:37.439+01:00`
- ancestors: Versions of Version News > (2024x Refresh3) 2024x Refresh3 Version News
- labels: []

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

### Systems Cybersecurity Designer

Released on: July 11, 2025

The 2024x Refresh3 release adds enhanced usability and improved standard compliance. Drag and drop support now allows seamless assignment of elements in ISO 21434 Element tables. Multi-selection of Threat Scenarios is now supported while generating or synchronizing the cybersecurity goals.Additionally,MITRE librarieshave been updated to the latest versions, and other improvements ensure accurate risk ratings and clearer notifications messages while working withTWC.

### Multi-selection support of Threat Scenarios

Multi-selection of Threat Scenarios in TARA table and in the Containment tree is now supported while using the **Generate/Synchronize Cybersecurity Goals** Command.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### Multi-selection of Threat Scenarios in TARA table is now supported while using the **Generate/Synchronize Cybersecurity Goals**Command.

MITRE Libraries

The following standard libraries provided with the ISO 21434 Plugin have been upgraded to reflect the latest versions of the corresponding dataset:

- MITRE CWE Library has been updated to version 4.16 .
- MITRE ATT&CK Enterprise Technique Library has been updated to version 16.1 .
- MITRE ATT&CK ICS Technique Library has been updated to version 16.1 .
- MITRE ATT&CK Platforms Library has been updated to version 16.1 .

### Other Improvements

- The new improvement now ensures that you can assign the relevant elements only to the corresponding properties. For example, the Failure Mode element can only be assigned to the Failure property of any Damage Scenario.
- The new improvement now ensures that the Threat Scenario has a risk rating before specifying a corresponding residual risk rating.
- The new improvement now ensures that the appropriate content is now displayed in the notification message while working with TWC.

### EXACT CONFLUENCE STORAGE SOURCE

````html

Drag and drop support now allows seamless assignment of elements in ISO 21434 Element tables. Multi-selection of Threat Scenarios is now supported while generating or synchronizing the cybersecurity goals.<span style="letter-spacing: 0.0px;"> Additionally, </span>MITRE libraries<span style="letter-spacing: 0.0px;"> have been updated to the latest versions, and other improvements ensure accurate risk ratings and clearer <span>notifications messages while working with </span>TWC.</span></p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><p><ac:link ac:anchor="Multi-selection support of Threat Scenarios" /></p><p><ac:link ac:anchor="MITRE Libraries" /></p><p><span><ac:link ac:anchor="Other Improvements" /></span></p><p><br /></p><h1><span>Multi-selection support of Threat Scenarios</span></h1><p>Multi-selection of Threat Scenarios in TARA table and in the Containment tree is now supported while using the <strong>Generate/Synchronize Cybersecurity Goals</strong> Command.</p><p><span><br /><ac:image ac:align="center"><ri:attachment ri:filename="Multi_selection.png" /></ac:image></span></p><h6 style="text-align: center;"><span>Multi-selection of Threat Scenarios in TARA table is now supported while using the <strong>Generate/Synchronize Cybersecurity Goals </strong>Command.</span></h6><p><span style="font-size: 24.0px;letter-spacing: -0.01em;">MITRE Libraries </span></p><p style="text-align: left;"><span style="letter-spacing: 0.0px;">The following standard libraries provided with the ISO 21434 Plugin have been upgraded to reflect the latest versions of the corresponding dataset:</span></p><ul><li>MITRE CWE Library has been updated to version <strong>4.16</strong>.</li><li>MITRE ATT&amp;CK Enterprise Technique Library has been updated to version <strong>16.1</strong>.</li><li>MITRE ATT&amp;CK ICS Technique Library has been updated to version <strong>16.1</strong>.</li><li>MITRE ATT&amp;CK Platforms Library has been updated to version <strong>16.1</strong>.</li></ul><h1 style="text-align: left;">Other Improvements</h1><ul style="text-align: left;"><li><span style="letter-spacing: 0.0px;">The new improvement now ensures that you can assign the relevant elements only to the corresponding properties. For example, the Failure Mode element can only be assigned to the Failure property of any Damage Scenario.</span></li><li><span style="letter-spacing: 0.0px;">The new improvement now ensures that the Threat Scenario has a risk rating before specifying a corresponding residual risk rating.</span></li><li>The new improvement now ensures that the appropriate content is now displayed in the notification message while working with TWC.</li></ul></ac:layout-cell></ac:layout-section><ac:layout-section ac:type="single"><ac:layout-cell><p><br /></p></ac:layout-cell></ac:layout-section><ac:layout-section ac:type="single"><ac:layout-cell><p><br /></p></ac:layout-cell></ac:layout-section></ac:layout>

<!--NOMAGIC_PAGE id=272746767 space=VN version=1 -->
## PAGE 00180: (2024x Refresh3) UAF 1.2 Plugin

- page_id: `272746767`
- space_key: `VN`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/VN/pages/272746767/2024x+Refresh3+UAF+1.2+Plugin
- version_number: 1
- version_date: `2025-11-27T17:27:19.783+01:00`
- ancestors: Versions of Version News > (2024x Refresh3) 2024x Refresh3 Version News
- labels: []

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

### UAF 1.2 Plugin

Released on: July 11, 2025

The**2024x Refresh3** release comes with Gantt Chart improvements such as the ability to control sub-resource visibility and depth in the Capability Provisions panel, and to manage their In Service / Out of Service dates directly. You can also now select Actual Project Milestones across multiple Gantt charts. Additionally, in this version, UAF element numbering was enhanced to support multi-level hierarchical numbering.

To download the latest version, see[Downloading installation files](https://docs.nomagic.com/display/IL2024xR3/Downloading+installation+files).For further information, check the[product documentation](https://docs.nomagic.com/display/UAF12P2024xR3).

- 
- 
- 

### Gantt Chart Improvements

- A new project option allows you to set the depth of displayed sub-resources in the Strategic Phasing/CV-3/StV-3/NCV-3/Cr Gantt Chart Capability Provisions panel. This lets you control how many sub-resource levels are displayed in the Capability Provision area. 
[IMAGE alt='' src='']
- A new toolbar button in the Gantt Chart allows you to toggle the visibility of sub-resources in the Capability Provisions panel. [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Working with Strategic Phasing diagram' space='UAF12P2024xR3']>>]]> 
[IMAGE alt='' src='']
- When you enable sub-resource visibility in the Strategic Phasing Gantt chart, you can now add, edit, or remove In Service / Out of Service dates for sub-resources directly in the Capability Provision area. [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Working with Strategic Phasing diagram' space='UAF12P2024xR3']>>]]> 
[IMAGE alt='' src='']
- Now you can select an existing In Srvice / Out of Service Actual Project Milestones in the following Gantt charts:
  - Strategic Phasing
  - Resources Evolution
  - Personnel Evolution
  - Services Roadmap

### UAF Element Numbering

In this version, the UAF element numbering was enhanced. The multi-levelnumbering is now available for UAF elements. Now, you can apply:

- hierarchical numbering to UAF elements (such as Driver, Operational Information),
- hierarchical numbering with dynamic prefixes for the UAF requirements (such as Enterprise Goal, Enterprise Objective) based on SysMLrequirements.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

[CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='UAF element numbering' space='UAF12P2024xR3']>>]]>

### Other Enhancements

- A new Correctness validation rule was implemented to check whether the Capability Provision's actual start/end dates align with the Capability Provision's consolidated start/end dates. [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='COR2362' space='UAF12P2024xR3']>>]]>

### EXACT CONFLUENCE STORAGE SOURCE

````html
<ac:layout><ac:layout-section ac:type="single"><ac:layout-cell><h1 style="text-align: center;">UAF 1.2 Plugin</h1><p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color:var(--ds-chart-gray-bold,#8590a2);">Released on: July 11, 2025</span></p><p><br /></p><p>The<strong> 2024x Refresh3</strong> release comes with Gantt Chart improvements such as the ability to control sub-resource visibility and depth in the Capability Provisions panel, and to manage their In Service / Out of Service dates directly. You can also now select Actual Project Milestones across multiple Gantt charts. <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Additionally, in this version, UAF element numbering was enhanced to support multi-level hierarchical numbering.</span></p><p><span style="letter-spacing: 0.0px;color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">To download the latest version, see </span><a href="https://docs.nomagic.com/display/IL2024xR3/Downloading+installation+files" style="letter-spacing: 0.0px;" rel="nofollow">Downloading installation files</a><span style="letter-spacing: 0.0px;color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">. </span><span style="letter-spacing: 0.0px;color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">For further information, check the </span><a style="letter-spacing: 0.0px;" href="https://docs.nomagic.com/display/UAF12P2024xR3" rel="nofollow">product documentation</a><span style="letter-spacing: 0.0px;color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">.</span></p><p><br /></p><ul><li data-uuid="c8fe44b4-9f2c-409a-b9b6-8e3d58f2a44a"><ac:link ac:anchor="Gantt Chart Improvements" /></li><li data-uuid="d06f9872-b59c-490c-9616-fe6bc2dfae72"><ac:link ac:anchor="UAF Element Numbering" /></li><li data-uuid="ff4df61e-2198-4fad-934d-d3b69e874a32"><ac:link ac:anchor="Other Enhancements" /></li></ul><p><br /></p><h1>Gantt Chart Improvements</h1><ul><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">A new project option allows you to set the depth of displayed sub-resources in the Strategic Phasing/CV-3/StV-3/NCV-3/Cr Gantt Chart Capability Provisions panel. This lets you control how many sub-resource levels are displayed in the Capability Provision area.<br /><ac:image ac:align="center"><ri:attachment ri:filename="sub_resource_depth.png" /></ac:image><br /></span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"><ac:inline-comment-marker ac:ref="9f3acff3-2326-4653-9aa0-475f550a21d4">A new toolbar button in the Gantt Chart allows you to toggle the visibility of sub-resources in the Capability Provisions panel. </ac:inline-comment-marker> <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="Working with Strategic Phasing diagram" ri:space-key="UAF12P2024xR3" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Learn more >>>]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link> <br /><ac:image ac:align="center"><ri:attachment ri:filename="Show_hide_sub_resources_in_the_capability_provision_area.png" /></ac:image><br /></span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">When you enable sub-resource visibility in the Strategic Phasing Gantt chart, you can now add, edit, or remove In Service / Out of Service dates for sub-resources directly in the Capability Provision area. <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="Working with Strategic Phasing diagram" ri:space-key="UAF12P2024xR3" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Learn more >>>]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link><br /><ac:image ac:align="center"><ri:attachment ri:filename="add_edit_remove_in_out_service_dates.png" /></ac:image><br /></span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Now you can select an existing In Srvice / Out of Service Actual Project Milestones in the following Gantt charts:</span><ul><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Strategic Phasing<br /></span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Resources Evolution<br /></span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Personnel Evolution<br /></span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Services Roadmap</span></li></ul></li></ul><h1>UAF Element Numbering</h1><p style="text-align: left;">In this version, the UAF element numbering was enhanced. The multi-level<span> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">numbering is now available for UAF elements. Now, you can apply:</span></p><ul style="text-align: left;"><li data-uuid="285e5cc9-197d-4829-b9e1-3a0bfd1fb251"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">hierarchical numbering to UAF elements (such as Driver, Operational Information),</span></li><li data-uuid="d216cef9-6fa8-4849-8f6e-8ca858140a97"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">hierarchical numbering with dynamic prefixes for the<span> </span> UAF requirements (such as Enterprise Goal, Enterprise Objective) based on SysML<span> </span>requirements.</span></li></ul><p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"><ac:image><ri:attachment ri:filename="hierarchical_element_numbering.png" /></ac:image></span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"><ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="UAF element numbering" ri:space-key="UAF12P2024xR3" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Learn more >>>]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link></span></p><p><br /></p><h1>Other Enhancements</h1><ul><li>A new Correctness validation rule was implemented to check whether the Capability Provision's actual start/end dates align with the Capability Provision's <ac:inline-comment-marker ac:ref="3f09d162-06f1-4901-911c-4dfa813e6d8a">consolidated start/end dates.</ac:inline-comment-marker> <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="COR2362" ri:space-key="UAF12P2024xR3" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Learn more >>>]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link></li></ul></ac:layout-cell></ac:layout-section><ac:layout-section ac:type="single"><ac:layout-cell><p><br /></p></ac:layout-cell></ac:layout-section><ac:layout-section ac:type="single"><ac:layout-cell><p><br /></p></ac:layout-cell></ac:layout-section></ac:layout>
````

<!--NOMAGIC_PAGE id=272743753 space=VN version=1 -->
## PAGE 00182: (2024x) 2024x Hot Fix 1

- page_id: `272743753`
- space_key: `VN`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/VN/pages/272743753/2024x+2024x+Hot+Fix+1
- version_number: 1
- version_date: `2025-11-27T14:30:02.800+01:00`
- ancestors: Versions of Version News > (2024x) 2024x Version News > (2024x) Hot Fixes
- labels: []

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

#### Magic Collaboration Studio / Teamwork Cloud

###### Released on: January 19, 2024

2024x Hot Fix 1 is now available for Magic Collaboration Studio / Teamwork Cloud with several bug fixes and performance improvements.

#### NOTE: 2024x Hot Fix 3 available

2024x Hot Fix 3 available

2024x Hot Fix 3 is now available for CATIA Magic and No Magic portfolios. It includes a number of improvements and bug fixes, and vulnerability fixes in our modeling tools, plugins, and server products . [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2024x) 2024x Hot Fix 3' space='']>]]>

#### NOTE: 2024x Hot Fix 2 available

2024x Hot Fix 2 available

2024x Hot Fix 2 is now available for CATIA Magic and No Magic portfolios. It includes a number of improvements and bug fixes, and vulnerability fixes in our modeling tools, plugins, and server products . [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2024x) 2024x Hot Fix 2' space='']>]]>

- The issue causing undesired session invalidation has been fixed. This fix eliminates problems like:
  - Losing uncommitted changes when working with Cameo Collaborator documents.
  - Generating extra requests to the server from services like Resources and Teamwork Cloud Admin.
  - Cache invalidations and performance issues.
- The performance concern where the Web Application Platform welcome page takes an extended time to load has been fixed.
- The issue where resources failed to load when changing role scope for large user groups has been eliminated.

### EXACT CONFLUENCE STORAGE SOURCE

````html
<h2 style="text-align: left;">Magic Collaboration Studio / Teamwork Cloud</h2><h6 style="text-align: center;">Released on: January 19, 2024</h6><p><br /></p><p>2024x Hot Fix 1 is now available for Magic Collaboration Studio / Teamwork Cloud with several bug fixes and performance improvements.</p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="note" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="a672b7b3-8ef4-458a-b61f-9c4fafd6dc87"><ac:parameter ac:name="title">2024x Hot Fix 3 available</ac:parameter><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">2024x Hot Fix 3 is now available for CATIA Magic and No Magic portfolios. <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">It includes a number of improvements and bug fixes, and vulnerability fixes in our modeling tools, plugins, and server products</span> </span> <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">. <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="(2024x) 2024x Hot Fix 3" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Learn more >>]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link> </span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><ac:structured-macro ac:name="note" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="9d1daf89-1df0-449b-9deb-faac38e4105f"><ac:parameter ac:name="title">2024x Hot Fix 2 available</ac:parameter><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">2024x Hot Fix 2 is now available for CATIA Magic and No Magic portfolios. <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">It includes a number of improvements and bug fixes, and vulnerability fixes in our modeling tools, plugins, and server products</span> </span> <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">. <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="(2024x) 2024x Hot Fix 2" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Learn more >>]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link></span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><ul><li data-uuid="a45c6cb0-82dd-4843-8b55-e7c07bd3ef99">The issue causing undesired session invalidation has been fixed. This fix eliminates problems like:<ul><li>Losing uncommitted changes when working with Cameo Collaborator documents.</li><li>Generating extra requests to the server from services like Resources and Teamwork Cloud Admin.</li><li>Cache invalidations and performance issues.</li></ul></li><li data-uuid="fc216018-6512-44c8-a9a6-4ee8364fb924">The performance concern where the Web Application Platform welcome page takes an extended time to load has been fixed.</li><li data-uuid="b838d188-e7c2-4ae5-83fd-180b433bd339">The issue where resources failed to load when changing role scope for large user groups has been eliminated.</li></ul>
````

<!--NOMAGIC_PAGE id=272743991 space=VN version=1 -->
## PAGE 00183: (2024x) 2024x Hot Fix 2

- page_id: `272743991`
- space_key: `VN`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/VN/pages/272743991/2024x+2024x+Hot+Fix+2
- version_number: 1
- version_date: `2025-11-27T14:30:41.339+01:00`
- ancestors: Versions of Version News > (2024x) 2024x Version News > (2024x) Hot Fixes
- labels: []

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

#### CATIA Magic / No Magic Modeling Tools

###### Released on: April 19, 2024

2024x Hot Fix 2 is now available for CATIA Magic and No Magic portfolios. It includes a number of improvements, bug fixes, and vulnerability fixes in our modeling tools and server products.

#### WARNING: Hot Fix version compatibility

Hot Fix version compatibility

The version and Hot Fix number of a modeling tool and its plugins must be the same. After installing the Hot Fix version of a modeling tool, select the same Hot Fix version when downloading its plugins. The modeling tool will not work correctly if you install plugins of a different version and/or Hot Fix number.

#### NOTE: 2024x Hot Fix 3 available

2024x Hot Fix 3 available

2024x Hot Fix 3 is now available for CATIA Magic and No Magic portfolios. It includes a number of improvements and bug fixes, and vulnerability fixes in our modeling tools, plugins, and server products . [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2024x) 2024x Hot Fix 3' space='']>]]>

##### Magic Software Architect / MagicDraw

- The anchor between a Note and a Legend Item no longer disappears after re-opening a project.
- A ‘Suspicious Expression’ error message is no longer displayed after metric recalculation with a valid expression in the Metric table.
- The issue where elements with large texts were causing indexing problems is fixed.
- Print, Print Preview, and Save As Image commands no longer ignore the 'Use Legends' project option.
- Error is no longer thrown when selecting a project in the 'Migrate Projects to Version' dialog if L&F is Office 2007.
- Table Legend adornments are now displayed in the 'Print Preview' dialog and images that are saved via the Save As Image command.
- Now, TableCellStyleProvider returns Table Style even if the table is not opened.

###### Collaboration

- 
  - The issue where in certain cases saving a Teamwork Cloud project locally creates circular project usages has been solved.
  - It is no longer possible to modify categories from the 'Offline' tab of the 'Projects' dialog.
  - The problem where a modeling tool fails to log in to Teamwork Cloud because the authentication constructed URL has a wrong port has been resolved.
  - The issue where diagram properties are not updated when updating a project has been fixed.
  - The issues that in certain cases cause question dialogs to pop up during project migration have been fixed.
  - Several issues when projects could not be updated from .szip file have been fixed.

###### Collaboration Powered by **3D**EXPERIENCE Platform

- 
  - You can now log in to the 3D EXPERIENCE platform with a custom port without any issues.
  - The issue were in certain cases a project could not be added to the 3D EXPERIENCE platform has been solved.
  - The problem where project usages cannot be updated because used projects are wrongly locked has been fixed.
  - The project loading error occurring after the project merge has been resolved.
  - The issue causing an error while migrating standard profiles to a new version has been fixed.
  - Libraries are now migrated properly when migrating project usages to a new version.
  - The issue when an open diagram is closed after adding a project to the **3D**Experience platform has been fixed.
  - The error which sometimes occurs when trying to connect to the 3D EXPERIENCE platform has been resolved.
  - The issue where a modeling tool sometimes connects to a wrong **3D**EXPERIENCE platform when logging in has been fixed.

##### Magic Cyber Systems Engineer / Cameo Systems Modeler / SysML

- The performance of Requirements verification by context is now improved.
- Issues regarding SysML features’ creation in MagicGrid template projects are now resolved.
- An internal error is no longer thrown when accessing the shortcut menu of a Block.

##### Magic Model Analyst / Cameo Simulation Toolkit

- The issue where starting the web server causes an internal error has been resolved.
- The Time Unit of a Step Size is no longer misinterpreted as milliseconds when running FMUs.
- Simulation no longer crashes if the 'Decimal Places' property/project option is not specified. The default value of 4 is used instead.
- The problem where the simulation suddenly stops working after exceeding a certain log file size has been eliminated.
- Now when exported FMU's are executed, the step endpoint is called only when the value of the 'simulationTime' has changed.

##### Magic Systems of Systems Architect / Cameo Enterprise Architecture / UAF 1.2

- The Affects relationship was adjusted to enable the selection of UAF Activities as its target.
- The correct identifier is now created and displayed for Enterprise Objective elements.
- The PES export functionality is no longer available.

##### Magic Collaboration Studio / Teamwork Cloud / Cameo Collaborator

- Fixed an issue where project update failed for projects created using an earlier version.
- Flexnet license can now be successfully applied using either Web Application Platform or Teamwork Cloud REST API.
- Component backend dependencies were updated.
- Improved performance of the Publish dialog in Cameo Collaborator Publisher.
- Fixed an issue where the font color of Generic Tables names would change after publishing.

##### Cameo DataHub

- Images inserted with the help of the [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Advanced HTML Editor dialog' space='MD2022xR2'] are now available for synchronization from the modeling tool to the ENOVIA Requirements application. To learn how to enable HTML image support , refer to [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='HTML images, RTF, and OLE support' space='CDH2022xR2'] .
- The synchronization issue occurring while moving the elements in the modeling tool is now fixed for the ENOVIA Requirements application.

##### Other

- Errors no longer appear after using the ‘Generate’ action and switching to another diagram while using a modeling tool with the CATIA Software Producer plugin.
- The issue where the Target Generation was not performed in "Flashlight_SOP.mdzip" sample project while using a modeling tool with the CATIA Software Producer plugin has been fixed.
- Names are no longer duplicated when generating profile code via the Development Tools plugin.

### EXACT CONFLUENCE STORAGE SOURCE

````html

It includes a number of improvements, bug fixes, and vulnerability fixes in our modeling tools and server products.</p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="warning" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="06e23f89-7e49-4415-8c18-a6a2aff251f9"><ac:parameter ac:name="title">Hot Fix version compatibility</ac:parameter><ac:rich-text-body><p>The version and Hot Fix number of a modeling tool and its plugins must be the same. data-uuid="6e401e18-a0ca-4c28-ba13-06d4ddc32885">Flexnet license can now be successfully applied using either Web Application Platform or Teamwork Cloud REST API. </li><li data-uuid="647f2a68-9c8a-4c6e-8d87-3e09b0eee40f">Component backend dependencies were updated.</li><li data-uuid="28c19d07-08c1-44d0-868e-392cde67673c">Improved performance of the Publish dialog in Cameo Collaborator Publisher.</li><li data-uuid="4f091993-2f38-4d39-a72a-ee58d65e666b">Fixed an issue where the font color of Generic Tables names would change after publishing.</li></ul><h3><span>Cameo DataHub</span></h3><ul><li data-uuid="00b2ba17-4822-496f-9e62-7a076d844381">Images inserted with the help of the <ac:link><ri:page ri:space-key="MD2022xR2" ri:content-title="Advanced HTML Editor dialog" /></ac:link> are now available for synchronization from the modeling tool to the ENOVIA Requirements application. To learn how to <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">enable HTML image support</span>, refer to <ac:link><ri:page ri:space-key="CDH2022xR2" ri:content-title="HTML images, RTF, and OLE support" /></ac:link>.</li><li data-uuid="42821917-05d2-4f6e-bc0c-db3ff1b80779"><p>The synchronization issue occurring while moving the elements in the modeling tool is now fixed for the ENOVIA Requirements application.</p></li></ul><h3><span>Other</span></h3><ul><li data-uuid="a2ae6f26-5721-4674-8f83-b9fc832418c6"><span>Errors no longer appear after using the ‘Generate’ action and switching to another diagram while using a modeling tool with the CATIA Software Producer plugin. </span></li><li data-uuid="2cff6b4f-2c21-4694-9bc7-b0eae19a05da"><span>The issue where the Target Generation was not performed in &quot;Flashlight_SOP.mdzip&quot; sample project while using a modeling tool with the CATIA Software Producer plugin has been fixed.</span></li><li data-uuid="97dc9858-76c5-4dce-9bd0-a0c8535865a4"><span>Names are no longer duplicated when generating profile code via the Development Tools plugin.</span></li></ul><p><br /></p>
````

<!--NOMAGIC_PAGE id=272743860 space=VN version=1 -->
## PAGE 00184: (2024x) 2024x Hot Fix 3

- page_id: `272743860`
- space_key: `VN`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/VN/pages/272743860/2024x+2024x+Hot+Fix+3
- version_number: 1
- version_date: `2025-11-27T14:30:15.735+01:00`
- ancestors: Versions of Version News > (2024x) 2024x Version News > (2024x) Hot Fixes
- labels: []

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

#### CATIA Magic / No Magic Modeling Tools

###### Released on: February 29, 2024

2024x Hot Fix 3 is now available for CATIA Magic and No Magic portfolios. It includes a number of improvements, bug fixes, and [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2024x) Addressed vulnerabilities and component changes' space=''] in our modeling tools and server products. [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='3DS Media list for 2024x Hot Fix 3 release' space='IL2024x']>]]>

#### WARNING: Hot Fix version compatibility

Hot Fix version compatibility

The version and Hot Fix number of a modeling tool and its plugins must be the same. After installing the Hot Fix version of a modeling tool, select the same Hot Fix version when downloading its plugins. The modeling tool will not work correctly if you install plugins of a different version and/or Hot Fix number.

##### Magic Software Architect / MagicDraw

- The issue where magnifying a relation map using a Mac trackpad throws an exception has been resolved.
- The screen recording dialog is no longer shown upon launching the modeling tool on macOS.
- The modeling tool no longer freezes upon clicking the ‘Add New’ button in a Generic Table.
- The issue of the DSLS Mac native library not being signed has been resolved.
- The modeling tool no longer gets unresponsive when a modeling tool-specific window is placed on a second monitor and the monitor is disconnected.
- The issue where a validation failure is not reported if the error message has an incorrect script has been resolved.
- The issue where an element is pasted to the current owner if the containment path on a diagram is pasted too has been resolved. Now, you can copy-paste an element to a different owner, allowing you to update the containment path.
- The issue of pasting HTML text in the Advanced HTML Editor not displaying the pasted text in the TextBox or Note has been resolved.
- You can now view the Hot Fix version of the modeling tool you are using in the About dialog, located in the Main Menu > Help > About <modeling_tool_name>.
- Excel file texts are no longer imported with incorrect fonts.
- The issue where updated table rows are not highlighted after syncing Excel files has been resolved.
- JxBrowser has been updated to version 7.41.2 to support modeling tool features with an embedded web browser for macOS Sequoia users.

###### Collaboration

- 
  - The issue where in certain cases you get an exception after initializing the usages table has been fixed.
  - The problem where in some occasions it is impossible to change a used project version has been resolved.

###### Collaboration Powered by **3D**EXPERIENCE Platform

- 
  - The Requirements table no longer gets corrupted after a project commit.

##### Magic Cyber Systems Engineer / Cameo Systems Modeler / SysML

- The issue of Simulink blocks with complex calculations not being imported has been resolved.
- The port symbol property’s ‘Position of Labels’ value ‘Inside Enclosing Shape’ now works as expected for nested ports.

##### Magic Model Analyst / Cameo Simulation Toolkit

- The issue where bundled Java is not used for the simulation from the command line has been fixed.
- Now, Dymola 2024x Refresh1 works with the simulation plugin with no issues.
- The problem where server-side simulation needs an additional license to work has been resolved.
- During simulation, the default value of a constraint parameter is now passed to another constraint parameter as expected.
- The issue where in some occasions a signal is not send and a State Machine is stuck waiting for signal has been fixed.
- The issue where you cannot select a classifier as the value of a variable has been resolved.

##### Magic Collaboration Studio / Teamwork Cloud / Cameo Collaborator

- Fixed a cross-cluster resource synchronization failure that would occur when the authentication token changed.
- Cross-cluster resource synchronization no longer fails when previously merged branches are removed from the target server.
- Performance issues caused by creating model elements via the Teamwork Cloud REST API, which resulted in large multi-value property lists, have been resolved.

##### Cameo DataHub

- The migration issues that occurred while accessing synchronized data from previous versions have been fixed to ensure data consistency.

##### Other

- The support for [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='CATIA Software Producer' space='MD2024x'] 2024x version is no longer available.

### EXACT CONFLUENCE STORAGE SOURCE

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

###### Released on November 10, 2023

#### TIP: Welcome to the version news site for CATIA Magic / No Magic products!

Welcome to the version news site for CATIA Magic / No Magic products!

Get started by selecting a product below and its version in the site header.

##### Hot Fixes for version 2024x

- 2024x Hot Fix 3 2024x Hot Fix 3 was released on November 29, 2024, for the CATIA Magic and No Magic portfolios. It includes a number of improvements and bug fixes, as well as vulnerability fixes in our modeling tools, plugins, and server products . [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2024x) 2024x Hot Fix 3' space='']>]]>
- **2024x Hot Fix 2**2024x Hot Fix 2 was released on April 19, 2024, for the CATIA Magic and No Magic portfolios. It includes a number of improvements and bug fixes, and vulnerability fixes in our modeling tools, plugins, and server products. [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2024x) 2024x Hot Fix 2' space='']>]]>
- **2024x Hot Fix 1**2024x Hot Fix 1 was released on January 19, 2024, for Magic Collaboration Studio / Teamwork Cloud with several bug fixes and performance improvements. [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2024x) 2024x Hot Fix 1' space='']>]]>

## PAGE 00186: (2024x) Addressed vulnerabilities and component changes

- page_id: `272743862`
- space_key: `VN`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/VN/pages/272743862/2024x+Addressed+vulnerabilities+and+component+changes
- version_number: 1
- version_date: `2025-11-27T14:30:19.110+01:00`
- ancestors: Versions of Version News > (2024x) 2024x Version News > (2024x) Hot Fixes > (2024x) 2024x Hot Fix 3
- labels: []

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

Open Source components have been updated, as listed below, to address known software vulnerabilities. Legal Notices will be updated to reflect these, and other changes, at the next scheduled regular release.

##### Teamwork Cloud/Magic Collaboration Studio

| Library | Old version | New version | CVEs addressed |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| BouncyCastle provider | 1.56 | 1.70 |  |
| Eclipse EMF common | 2.30.0 | 2.31.0 |  |
| Eclipse EMF ecore | 2.36.0 | 2.37.0 |  |
| Eclipse EMF xmi | 2.37.0 | 2.38.0 |  |
| Jetty | 9.4.54.v20240208 | 9.4.56.v20240826 |  |
| Netty | 4.1.107.Final | 4.1.112.Final | CVE-2024-29025 |
| ElasticSearch | 7.17.18 | 7.17.24 | CVE-2024-23450 |

##### Cameo Simulation Toolkit / Magic Model Analyst

| Library | Old version | New version | CVEs addressed |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| jfreechart | 1.5.3 | 1.5.5 |  |
| Jetty | 9.4.54.v20240208 | 9.4.56.v20240826 | CVE-2024-6763, CVE-2024-8184 |

##### Cameo DataHub

| Library | Old Version | New version | CVEs addressed |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| h2 | 2.2.224 | 2.3.232 | CVE-2018-14335 |
| velocity-engine-core | 2.3 | 2.4 | CVE-2024-47554 |

##### WebApps

| Library | Old version | New version | CVEs addressed |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ASM | 9.5 | 9.7 |  |
| Angus Email | 2.0.2 | 2.0.3 |  |
| SLF4J API | 2.0.12 | 2.0.16 |  |
| Spring Framework | 6.0.18 | 6.0.23 |  |
| Apache HttpComponents Core HTTP/1.1 | 5.2.4 | 5.2.5 |  |
| Jacoco Maven Plugin | 0.8.10 | 0.8.12 |  |
| AspectJ Weaver | 1.9.21.1 | 1.9.21.2 |  |
| Jakarta Activation API | 2.1.2 | 2.1.3 |  |
| Byte Buddy | 1.14.12 | 1.14.19 |  |
| Apache Log4j | 2.23.0 | 2.23.1 | - |
| bcpkix-jdk18on, bcprov-jdk18on, bcutil-jdk18on | 1.77 | 1.78.1 | CVE-2024-29857CVE-2024-30171CVE-2024-30172CVE-2024-34447 |
| java-support | 8.4.0 | 8.4.2 | CVE-2024-22262CVE-2024-22259CVE-2024-22243CVE-2023-6378 |
| commons-codec | 1.16.1 | 1.17.1 | - |
| commons-io | 2.15.1 | 2.17.0 | - |
| commons-validator | 1.7 | 1.9.0 | CVE-2020-15250 |
| micrometer-commons, micrometer-observation | 1.12.4 | 1.12.9 | - |
| Spring Security | 6.2.3 | 6.2.6 | CVE-2024-38809CVE-2024-22262 |
| OpenSAML | 4.3.0 | 4.3.2 | CVE-2024-22262CVE-2024-22259CVE-2024-22243CVE-2023-44483 |
| XmlBeans | 5.2.0 | 5.2.1 | - |
| XML APIs | - | 1.4.01 | - |

<!--NOMAGIC_PAGE id=272743692 space=VN version=1 -->
## PAGE 00187: (2024x) Cameo Collaborator for Teamwork Cloud

- page_id: `272743692`
- space_key: `VN`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/VN/pages/272743692/2024x+Cameo+Collaborator+for+Teamwork+Cloud
- version_number: 1
- version_date: `2025-11-27T14:29:50.529+01:00`
- ancestors: Versions of Version News > (2024x) 2024x Version News
- labels: []

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

###### Released on: November 10, 2023

Cameo Collaborator for Teamwork Cloud 2024x brings a range of exciting enhancements as well. This version empowers you to customize PDF/HTML templates, cross-reference tables and figures within documents, use a new Wiki document viewing mode for a smoother navigation and editing experience, share specific diagram versions, export tables to Excel, and offers additional smaller improvements.

##### Customizable Templates for Document Export to PDF/HTML

With Cameo Collaborator for Teamwork Cloud 2024x, customizing the appearance of the PDF or HTML files generated from Cameo Collaborator documents has never been easier. Now, you can download the default PDF/HTML template directly from a Cameo Collaborator document. After downloading, you can make any desired changes and then upload the modified template back to the document. Moreover, a single document has the capability to hold multiple PDF/HTML templates. Therefore, this exciting feature empowers you to generate different outputs from the same document, allowing you to satisfy the unique requirements of different recipients. You will be able to alter the generated document's cover page, header, footer, and font, and even add a custom logo to the document.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### Uploading a custom PDF/HTML template to a Cameo Collaborator document.

##### Adding Cross References in Cameo Collaborator Documents

One crucial aspect of document creation involves cross-referencing different parts of the document. The new version of Cameo Collaborator for Teamwork Cloud offers a convenient and easy way to incorporate references to any part of a Cameo Collaborator document, including figures and tables located within specific sections. We are confident that this functionality will assist you in producing documents that are both easy to read and navigate.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### Adding a hyperlink to a presentation element in a document section.

##### A New Document Viewing Mode

This release introduces a new document viewing mode - the Wiki view. Similar to the Document view, it hides the details of the model while displaying the content of just one section, like the Model view. The Wiki view will provide you with a smoother content editing experience when the data needs to be managed in a wiki-style environment.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### Switching to the Wiki view.

##### Enhanced Diagram Sharing Capabilities

Besides being able to acquire a dynamic link to the latest version of a diagram in a Cameo Collaborator document, you now have the option to share a link to the current version of the diagram. This enables recipients to access a specific diagram version, even if the document is updated.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### Getting the link to a specific (current) version of a diagram.

##### Exporting Tables to Excel

This release introduces a new functionality, which allows you to export tables within Cameo Collaborator documents to the Excel format.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### Exporting a table to the Excel format.

##### Other Improvements

- In addition to FlexNet, Cameo Collaborator for Teamwork Cloud now supports the DSLS licensing server as well.
- The email notification capability has been improved and now works with mailing servers using SSL/TLS encryption.
- Now, Cameo Collaborator documents support data markings inside tables, ensuring consistency between documents and related server projects.
- The Cameo Collaborator Publisher plugin allows you to publish a new type of resource - **3D**EXPERIENCE Systems Traceability resource (TRA) - which can be used in the Systems Traceability app on the **3D**EXPERIENCE platform. 
 
[IMAGE alt='' src='']
- With the improved Cameo Collaborator Publisher plugin, you can now select which document to update in case several documents are published from the same project.

##### Documentation

- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Cameo Collaborator for Teamwork Cloud' space='TWCloud2024x']

## PAGE 00188: (2024x) Cameo DataHub

- page_id: `272743755`
- space_key: `VN`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/VN/pages/272743755/2024x+Cameo+DataHub
- version_number: 1
- version_date: `2025-11-27T14:30:05.341+01:00`
- ancestors: Versions of Version News > (2024x) 2024x Version News
- labels: ['news-feature']

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

1188011233

1188011254

1188011232

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

Released on: November 10, 2023

In version 2024x, we have put a lot of effort into delivering the new driver, Jama Connect® (Technology Preview). You can now use the new Jama Connect driver to add data sources in the Cameo DataHub Explorer panel. The Jama Connect driver is only available as a technology preview and should not be used for production. Learn more about thesupported features, , and below.

1188186617

###### Jama Connect®(Technology Preview)

For adding data sources, a new Jama Connect driver has been added to the list of existing drivers. You can authenticate with the aid of your User Name and password. As of now, data copying and synchronization can be done only from Jama Connect to the Modelling tool.Data copying and synchronization from the Modeling tool to Jama Connect will be available beginning with the next DataHub release.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### The new driver Jama Connect available in the driver list

##### Supported features

1. You can authenticate with the aid ofyour User Name and password. Connection to both the Cloud and On-premise versions of Jama Connect is possible.
2. When connected, you can see the list of all projects available in the Jama Connect web app.
3. You can drill down the structure of a project selected from the list of all projects available to you. This feature is affected by and .
4. The list of properties is available when you double-click the selected Jama Connect Project item
5. Currently, you can only synchronize the selected part of your project from Jama Connect to the Cameo Model. This feature is affected by .
6. The Scheme Map Manager is available to map, create, update, import, export, or set to be used by default data mappings between the Cameo Model and the Jama Connect project.
7. When the synchronized part of the Jama Connect project is updated on the Jama Connect or Cameo model side, the “Check for change” command is available to visually represent the difference. “New”, “Moved”, “Delete” and other statuses are represented with different background colors for visual clarity. It is also possible to see which exact property is updated, as well as the new value.
8. Once the change is confirmed for either all or selected items, the Cameo model is updated.

##### Features expected in next releases

1. More Jama Connect item properties will be available for mappings.
2. Two-way synchronization from the Jama Connect to the modeling tool and vice versa will be supported.
3. Images will be available to synchronize.
4. Diagram synchronization from the modeling tool to the Jama Connect project will be available.
5. Support for browser-based authentication will be available.
6. Diagram synchronization process from the command line UI will be available.
7. Data synchronization process from the command line will be available. The synchronization-related settings will be stored on the configuration file.

##### Limitations of Jama Connect

1. The link representation in the Cameo Datahub tree is incorrect.
2. The sync icon is not shown for child elements.
3. The project structure is not copied correctly to the modeling tool.

1188011243

**Cameo DataHub documentation**

- Cameo DataHub Documentation

<!--NOMAGIC_PAGE id=272743737 space=VN version=1 -->
## PAGE 00189: (2024x) Cameo Safety and Reliability Analyzer

- page_id: `272743737`
- space_key: `VN`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/VN/pages/272743737/2024x+Cameo+Safety+and+Reliability+Analyzer
- version_number: 1
- version_date: `2025-11-27T14:29:55.890+01:00`
- ancestors: Versions of Version News > (2024x) 2024x Version News
- labels: []

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

1865229334

INLINE

1865229355

INLINE

1865229344

INLINE

###### Cameo Safety and Reliability Analyzer

Released on: November 10, 2023

In this release, the Cameo Safety and Reliability Analyzer introduces a new plugin: [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Systems Cybersecurity Designer' space='CSRA2024x']. The Systems Cybersecurity Designer plugin enables security assessments on systems architecture as per ISO 21434:2021.

1865229333

INLINE

###### Systems Cybersecurity Designer

Cybersecurity engineering is a critical discipline thatensures safe and secure human experiences using cyber physical systems. The main challenge is to preserve trust for connected cyber systems in an evolving digital economy increasingly threatened by unpredictable events. The[CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Systems Cybersecurity Designer' space='CSRA2024x']Systems CybersecurityDesigner supports the[ISO/SAE 21434 standard](https://www.iso.org/standard/70918.html). Itenables a proactive and continuous security assessment in the initial design phase to reduce product development costs and time. Systems cybersecurity designers are able to create a Threat Analysis and Risk Assessment (TARA) project template to comply with the ISO/SAE 21434:2021. TheSystemsCybersecurity Designer is based in [SysML](https://www.omgsysml.org/what-is-sysml.htm)and [RAAML](https://www.omg.org/spec/RAAML/1.0/Beta2/About-RAAML).

TheSystemsCybersecurity Designerallows a cybersecurity designer to:

- Design a safe and secure system through a built-in scalable cyber system model, which includes assets, weaknesses, threats, attack paths, and security requirements.
- Perform continuous threat assessments and hazard analyses to enhance design through real world scenarios.
- Support certification needs with consistent safety and cybersecurity compliance views.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

###### top

###### Released on: November 10, 2023

In the 2024x version, Alf can now be utilized as a scripting language to write simple expressions (for example, using dot notation) without the need for compilation. These scripts can be employed in Opaque Actions, Opaque Behaviors, Opaque Expressions, State Machine Guards, and even directly in the Simulation Console. [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Alf as scripting language' space='ALFP2024x']>>]]>

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### Simple Alf scripts used in State Machine diagram

<!--NOMAGIC_PAGE id=272743593 space=VN version=1 -->
## PAGE 00193: (2024x) Magic Collaboration Studio / Teamwork Cloud and Services

- page_id: `272743593`
- space_key: `VN`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/VN/pages/272743593/2024x+Magic+Collaboration+Studio+Teamwork+Cloud+and+Services
- version_number: 1
- version_date: `2025-11-27T14:29:42.594+01:00`
- ancestors: Versions of Version News > (2024x) 2024x Version News
- labels: []

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

### Magic Collaboration Studio

Released on: November 10, 2023

Version 2024x of Magic Collaboration Studio introduces updates that enhance your user experience. You can now conveniently visualize branch activity, use a new role to manage user group memberships, and select the exact branches to listen for when creating webhooks. You can also filter out users with locked elements in the Users application, track data markings' changes in the Audit report, and use DSLS licensing framework in addition to FlexNet.

Cameo Collaborator for Teamwork Cloud 2024x brings a range of exciting enhancements as well. This version empowers you to customize PDF/HTML templates, cross-reference tables and figures within documents, use a new Wiki document viewing mode for a smoother navigation and editing experience, share specific diagram versions, export tables to Excel, and offers additional smaller improvements.

#### NOTE: 2024x Hot Fix 3 available

2024x Hot Fix 3 available

2024x Hot Fix 3 is now available for CATIA Magic and No Magic portfolios. It includes a number of improvements and bug fixes, and vulnerability fixes in our modeling tools, plugins, and server products . [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='2024x Hot Fix 3 Version News' space='CATIA']>]]>

#### NOTE: 2024x Hot Fix 2 available

2024x Hot Fix 2 available

2024x Hot Fix 2 is now available for CATIA Magic and No Magic portfolios. It includes a number of improvements and bug fixes, and vulnerability fixes in our modeling tools, plugins, and server products . [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='2024x Hot Fix 2 Version News' space='CATIA']>]]>

****

- 
- 
- 
- 
- 
- 

****

- 
- 
- 
- 
- 
- 

###### Magic Collaboration Studio and Teamwork Cloud Admin

##### Visual Branch Representation

We implemented a visual representation of branch activity, which enhances your experience by helping you to better understand and track merges, branches, and associated commit information.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### Visual representation of branch activity.

##### New User Group Membership Manager Role

To streamline user group management, we introduce the new User Group Membership Manager role. This role allows you to efficiently add or remove users within specific user groups, thus, you no longer need your administrator’s assistance for routine user group management tasks.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### User Group Membership Manager role permissions and scope.

##### Selecting Branch for Webhooks

When creating a webhook, you can select the specific branch or branches in which the webhook will listen for events. This enhanced control capability is available for resource-scoped webhooks of the commit or tagged commit event type.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### Choosing branches in which the webhook will listen for events.

##### Case-Insensitive LDAP Authentication

It has come to our attention that most LDAP servers across our customer base are configured to act as case-insensitiveby default. Therefore, fromnowon the authentication process against external users coming from LDAP servers is case insensitive as well. This eliminates the need to remember the exact caseof your username as set in the organization’s LDAP server.

##### Other fixes/improvements

- A new filter is available in the **Users**application, allowing you to view users with locked elements.
- The **Audit**report now additionally tracks and displays changes in data markings.
- In addition to the Flexnet licensing framework, Magic Collaboration Studio now supports the **DSLS licensing framework**.

##### Deployment Changes

- **Web Application Platform:**Apache Tomcat version requirements have changed. Now the minimum supported version is 10.1.
- **Web Application Platform:**the servlet specification has been changed to Jakarta 10.
- Magic Collaboration Studio no longer supports CentOS 7 due to its approaching EOL. Instead, it now supports Oracle Linux 8.

### Cameo Collaborator for Teamwork Cloud

##### Customizable Templates for Document Export to PDF/HTML

With Cameo Collaborator for Teamwork Cloud 2024x, customizing the appearance of the PDF or HTML files generated from Cameo Collaborator documents has never been easier. Now, you can download the default PDF/HTML template directly from a Cameo Collaborator document. After downloading, you can make any desired changes and then upload the modified template back to the document. Moreover, a single document has the capability to hold multiple PDF/HTML templates. Therefore, this exciting feature empowers you to generate different outputs from the same document, allowing you to satisfy the unique requirements of different recipients. You will be able to alter the generated document's cover page, header, footer, and font, and even add a custom logo to the document.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### Uploading a custom PDF/HTML template to a Cameo Collaborator document.

##### Adding Cross References in Cameo Collaborator Documents

One crucial aspect of document creation involves cross-referencing different parts of the document. The new version of Cameo Collaborator for Teamwork Cloud offers a convenient and easy way to incorporate references to any part of a Cameo Collaborator document, including figures and tables located within specific sections. We are confident that this functionality will assist you in producing documents that are both easy to read and navigate.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### Adding a hyperlink to a presentation element in a document section.

##### A New Document Viewing Mode

This release introduces a new document viewing mode - the Wiki view. Similar to the Document view, it hides the details of the model while displaying the content of just one section, like the Model view. The Wiki view will provide you with a smoother content editing experience when the data needs to be managed in a wiki-style environment.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### Switching to the Wiki view.

##### Enhanced Diagram Sharing Capabilities

Besides being able to acquire a dynamic link to the latest version of a diagram in a Cameo Collaborator document, you now have the option to share a link to the current version of the diagram. This enables recipients to access a specific diagram version, even if the document is updated.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### Getting the link to a specific (current) version of a diagram.

##### Exporting Tables to Excel

This release introduces a new functionality, which allows you to export tables within Cameo Collaborator documents to the Excel format.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### Exporting a table to the Excel format.

##### Other Improvements

- In addition to FlexNet, Cameo Collaborator for Teamwork Cloud now supports the DSLS licensing server as well.
- The email notification capability has been improved and now works with mailing servers using SSL/TLS encryption.
- Now, Cameo Collaborator documents support data markings inside tables, ensuring consistency between documents and related server projects.
- The Cameo Collaborator Publisher plugin allows you to publish a new type of resource - **3D**EXPERIENCE Systems Traceability resource (TRA) - which can be used in the Systems Traceability app on the **3D**EXPERIENCE platform. 
 
[IMAGE alt='' src='']
- With the improved Cameo Collaborator Publisher plugin, you can now select which document to update in case several documents are published from the same project.

**Documentation**

- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Magic Collaboration Studio Documentation' space='MCS2024x']

**News of earlier versions**

- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='2022x Refresh2 Version News' space='MCS2022xR2']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='2022x Refresh1 Version News' space='MCS2022xR1']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='2022x Version News' space='MCS2022x']

### EXACT CONFLUENCE STORAGE SOURCE

representation of branch activity.</h6><h3><span>New User Group Membership Manager Role</span></h3><p><span>To streamline user group management, we introduce the new User Group Membership Manager role. This role allows you to efficiently add or remove users within specific user groups, thus, you no longer need your administrator’s assistance for routine user group management tasks.</span></p><p><br /></p><p style="text-align: center;"><ac:image ac:height="106" ac:width="550"><ri:attachment ri:filename="User Group Membership Manager.png" /></ac:image></p><h6 style="text-align: center;">User Group Membership Manager role permissions and scope.</h6><h3><span>Selecting Branch for Webhooks</span></h3><p><span>When creating a webhook, you can select the specific branch or branches in which the webhook will listen for events. This enhanced control capability is available for resource-scoped webhooks of the commit or tagged commit event type.</span></p><p style="text-align: center;"><ac:image ac:width="600"><ri:attachment ri:filename="selecting_branches_to_listen.png" /></ac:image></p><h6 style="text-align: center;">Choosing branches in which the webhook will listen for events.</h6><h3 style="text-align: left;">Case-Insensitive LDAP Authentication</h3><p style="text-align: left;"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-magenta-bolder,#50253f);">It has come to our attention that most LDAP servers across our customer base are configured to act as case-insensitive</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-magenta-bolder,#50253f);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-magenta-bolder,#50253f);">by default</span>. Therefore, from<span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-magenta-bolder,#50253f);"><span> </span></span>now<span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-magenta-bolder,#50253f);"><span> </span>on the authentication process against external users coming from LDAP servers is case insensitive as well. This eliminates the need to remember the exact case<span> </span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-magenta-bolder,#50253f);">of your username as set in the organization’s LDAP server.</span></p><h3><span>Other fixes/improvements</span></h3><ul><li data-uuid="4e2465a8-19ee-463b-a4fc-cf6ce4bbe232"><span>A new filter is available in the <strong>Users </strong>application, allowing you to view users with locked elements.</span></li><li data-uuid="b9351d78-765f-42ba-9f2e-9fa778d8370f"><span>The <strong>Audit </strong>report now additionally tracks and displays changes in data markings.</span></li><li data-uuid="25f046da-0836-402b-9f64-169bd133288b"><span>In addition to the Flexnet licensing framework, Magic Collaboration Studio now supports the <strong>DSLS licensing framework</strong>.</span></li></ul><h3>Deployment Changes</h3><ul><li data-uuid="1f9e9050-a1b9-4429-b6ec-83aec2542cae"><span><strong>Web Application Platform: </strong>Apache Tomcat version requirements have changed. Now the minimum supported version is 10.1.</span></li><li data-uuid="1f3caa22-4087-4b29-8c31-a2f044f7f4bf"><span><strong>Web Application Platform: </strong>the servlet specification has been changed to Jakarta 10.</span></li><li data-uuid="1dd7dccc-5dc5-44b1-ab23-daa1689f87b8"><span>Magic Collaboration Studio no longer supports CentOS 7 due to its approaching EOL. Instead, it now supports Oracle Linux 8.</span></li></ul><p><br /></p><h1>Cameo Collaborator for Teamwork Cloud</h1><h3>Customizable Templates for Document Export to PDF/HTML</h3><p>With Cameo Collaborator for Teamwork Cloud 2024x, customizing the appearance of the PDF or HTML files generated from Cameo Collaborator documents has never been easier. Now, you can download the default PDF/HTML template directly from a Cameo Collaborator document. After downloading, you can make any desired changes and then upload the modified template back to the document. Moreover, a single document has the capability to hold multiple PDF/HTML templates. Therefore, this exciting feature empowers you to generate different outputs from the same document, allowing you to satisfy the unique requirements of different recipients. You will be able to alter the generated document's cover page, header, footer, and font, and even add a custom logo to the document.</p><p><br /></p><p style="text-align: center;"><ac:image><ri:attachment ri:filename="PDF_HTML_templates.png" /></ac:image></p><h6 style="text-align: center;">Uploading a custom PDF/HTML template to a Cameo Collaborator document.</h6><h3><br />Adding Cross References in Cameo Collaborator Documents</h3><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-purple-bolder,#352c63);">One crucial aspect of document creation involves cross-referencing different parts of the document. The new version of Cameo Collaborator for Teamwork Cloud offers a convenient and easy way to incorporate references to any part of a Cameo Collaborator document, including figures and tables located within specific sections. We are confident that this functionality will assist you in producing documents that are both easy to read and navigate.</span></p><p><br /></p><p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-purple-bolder,#352c63);"> <ac:image><ri:attachment ri:filename="hyperlink_to_presentation_element.png" /></ac:image> </span></p><h6 style="text-align: center;">Adding a hyperlink to a presentation element in a document section.</h6><h3><br />A New Document Viewing Mode</h3><p>This release introduces a new document viewing mode - the Wiki view. <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-purple-bolder,#352c63);">Similar to the Document view, it</span> hides the details of the model while displaying the content of just one section, like the Model view. The Wiki view will provide you with a smoother content editing experience when the <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">data needs to be managed in a wiki-style environment.</span></p><p><br /></p><p style="text-align: center;"><ac:image><ri:attachment ri:filename="wiki_view.png" /></ac:image></p><h6 style="text-align: center;">Switching to the Wiki view.</h6><h3>Enhanced Diagram Sharing Capabilities</h3><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-purple-bolder,#352c63);">Besides being able to acquire a dynamic link to the latest version of a diagram in a Cameo Collaborator document, you now have the option to share a link to the current version of the diagram. This enables recipients to access a specific diagram version, even if the document is updated.</span></p><p><br /></p><p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-purple-bolder,#352c63);"> <ac:image><ri:attachment ri:filename="getting_diagram_link.png" /></ac:image> </span></p><h6 style="text-align: center;">Getting the link to a specific (current) version of a diagram.</h6><h3>Exporting Tables to Excel</h3><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-purple-bolder,#352c63);">This release introduces a new functionality, which allows you to export tables within Cameo Collaborator documents to the Excel format.</span></p><p><br /></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-purple-bolder,#352c63);"> <ac:image ac:align="center"><ri:attachment ri:filename="exporting_tables.png" /></ac:image> </span></p><h6 style="text-align: center;">Exporting a table to the Excel format.</h6><h3>Other Improvements</h3><ul><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-purple-bolder,#352c63);">In addition to FlexNet, Cameo Collaborator for Teamwork Cloud now supports the DSLS licensing server as well.</span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-purple-bolder,#352c63);">The email notification capability has been improved and now works with mailing servers using SSL/TLS encryption.</span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-purple-bolder,#352c63);">Now, Cameo Collaborator documents support data markings inside tables, ensuring consistency between documents and related server projects.</span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-purple-bolder,#352c63);">The Cameo Collaborator Publisher plugin allows you to publish a new type of resource - <strong>3D</strong>EXPERIENCE Systems Traceability resource (TRA) - which can be used in the Systems Traceability app on the <strong>3D</strong>EXPERIENCE platform.<br /><br /><ac:image><ri:attachment ri:filename="tra_resource.png" /></ac:image> <br /><br /></span></li><li>With the improved Cameo Collaborator Publisher plugin, you can now select which document to update in case several documents are published from the same project.</li></ul><p><br /></p><p><strong>Documentation</strong></p><ul><li><ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="Magic Collaboration Studio Documentation" ri:space-key="MCS2024x" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Magic Collaboration Studio 2024x]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link></li></ul><p><strong>News of earlier versions</strong></p><ul><li><ac:link><ri:page ri:space-key="MCS2022xR2" ri:content-title="2022x Refresh2 Version News" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Magic Collaboration Studio 2022x Refresh2]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link></li><li><ac:link><ri:page ri:space-key="MCS2022xR1" ri:content-title="2022x Refresh1 Version News" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Magic Collaboration Studio 2022x Refresh1]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link></li><li><ac:link><ri:page ri:space-key="MCS2022x" ri:content-title="2022x Version News" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Magic Collaboration Studio 2022x]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link></li></ul></ac:layout-cell></ac:layout-section><ac:layout-section ac:type="single"><ac:layout-cell><p><br /></p></ac:layout-cell></ac:layout-section><ac:layout-section ac:type="single"><ac:layout-cell><p><br /></p></ac:layout-cell></ac:layout-section></ac:layout>
````

## PAGE 00195: (2024x) Magic Cyber Systems Engineer / Cameo Systems Modeler

- page_id: `272743381`
- space_key: `VN`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/VN/pages/272743381/2024x+Magic+Cyber+Systems+Engineer+Cameo+Systems+Modeler
- version_number: 1
- version_date: `2025-11-27T14:29:26.914+01:00`
- ancestors: Versions of Version News > (2024x) 2024x Version News
- labels: []

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

#### CONTENT-LAYER: 2024x Hot Fix 2 available

753686899

INLINE

#### CONTENT-COLUMN: 2024x Hot Fix 2 available
